personal_info.name: NGUYEN QUOC KHANH
personal_info.about_me: I like dealing with difficult problems and challenging issues. Besides that, I’m rather serious and proactive in my work. I expect to contribute and develop with your company. Besides being a coder, I also love football.

description: Create UI system manage networks belong to MobiFone + Integrations API for system + Work according to the Agile model
Build database for the system + UI design + Building frontend + Build electronic connections
Using atoms design to build the system + Use scss, axios, antd and many library react + Learn teamwork skills + Building modules validate form, handle authen system
Deploy the project as a front end developer + Use material ui library, react lib + Handle effect on component
